I can schedule this, but I need a couple quick clarifications first.

Availability on 2024-05-19:
- 10:00–11:00 — occupied (Project Kick-off)
- 11:00–11:30 — occupied (One-on-One)
So 10:00 isn’t available. Suggested alternate 1-hour slots that day:
- 09:00–10:00 (before the kick-off)
- 11:30–12:30 (immediately after the one‑on‑one)
- 14:00–15:00 (afternoon)

Please confirm:
1. Which of the above alternate times do you want, or do you want a different time that day?  
2. Meeting title (or I can use “Follow-up Meeting” / “Follow-up: Project Kick-off”).  
3. Participants to invite (names or emails).  
4. Location or conferencing link (or “I'll add later”).  
5. Short description — I can use this draft unless you want to edit:  
   "Follow-up to review action items and next steps from Project Kick-off."

Once you confirm these, I’ll create the event.
